scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @failspec/contracts && npm run build --workspace @failspec/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @failspec/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @failspec/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @failspec/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @failspec/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @failspec/contracts && npm run build --workspace @failspec/core && npm run test --workspace @failspec/contracts && npm run test --workspace @failspec/core && npm run test --workspace @failspec/server && npm run test --workspace @failspec/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @failspec/contracts && npm run build --workspace @failspec/core && npm run build --workspace @failspec/server && npm run build --workspace @failspec/web
